---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Current Courses (Goizueta)

### Valuation, Asset Pricing, and Prediction
*PhD course | Fall 2024-present*

### Machine Learning for Fundamental Analysis
*Newly developed course | Spring 2024-present*

### Blockchains and Crypto Assets
*Newly developed course | Spring 2023-present*

## Past Courses

- **Managerial Accounting** | Goizueta Business School, Emory University | Fall 2022
- **Managerial Accounting** | Kellogg School of Management, Northwestern University | Spring 2014-2022
- **Valuation and Asset Pricing** (PhD course) | Kellogg School of Management | Spring 2017
- **Accounting Theory and Contemporary Issues in Accounting** | York University | Winter 2011

## Research Supervision and Mentorship

### PhD Dissertation Committees

- **Blake Bawler** — placed at University of Florida
- **Andrew Stephen** — placed at University of Colorado
- **Eva Yan** — placed at Hunter College

### Research Supervision (Non-PhD)

- **Rishabh Aggarwal** — Stanford GSB Ph.D. Program
- **Clark Shu** — Rotman Ph.D. Program
- **Cindy Lu** — Machine Learning and AI Division of the Federal Reserve
- **Doron Czarny** — Liberty Advisor Group
